en.text: (in the m patrial from H1507; a Gezerite (collectively) or inhabitants of Gezer; but better (as in the text) bytransposition xlit Girzîy corrected to Gizrîy; patrial of H1630; a Grizite (collectively) or member of a native tribe in Palestine
